title: Brotein roadmap tabs — DeHardcoding API Keys, RevenueCat, TikTok, food-icon spec list
html:
A multi-tab document captured 10:48 pm — Yahir's Brotein working roadmap (Tabs 39-62) interleaved with a long food-icon design spec for the BroMenu UI. Tab titles include: Ranking Names, Official Terms & Condi[tions], Tab 43, Protein cards, DeHardcoding API Keys, CAMS INPUT ON APP, Tab 48, TikTok, RevenueCat, Tab 51, Foreign Language Comp[atibility], Manual testing, Roll the Dice, Safe APIKEYS, Video Ideas, Brotein Essence, Social, Tab 62, Nuanced descripti[ons]. The food-icon spec organizes restaurant-class icons (Burger, Pizza Slice, Sub Sandwich, Taco, Fried Chicken, Donut, Fries, Steak, Wing, Salad, Soup, Sushi, Ramen, Chinese Takeout, Coffee Cup, Croissant) and protein-source icons (Beef/Steak, Chicken, Fish, Tuna Tin, Eggs, Beef Jerky, Milk, Greek Yogurt, Cheese, Protein Shake, Nuts, Sauces, Oils, Canned Goods).

TL;DR

  • Hardcoded API keys are at the top of the roadmap — confirms the Secrets.xcconfig screenshot / nil unwrap crash week is when Yahir flagged this for real fix.
  • RevenueCat + TikTok entries foreshadow the late-July paywall + marketing push (2025 07 27 screenshot 2025 07 27 at 7 35 21 pm afce00b1, 2025 07 27 screenshot 2025 07 27 at 2 02 52 pm 11e3a138).
  • The food-icon spec is the visual-language layer for BroMenu / anabolic menu rankings — covers ~90% of fast-food + casual + Asian + café SKUs.

brotein · bromenu · anabolic scoring · revenuecat · supabase · openai api · snapchat
